header.headline: C-Kernel-Engine Quantization Formats
header.subtitle: Byte-level structure with explicit size calculations and dequantization math

legend.title: Legend
legend.note: Each box represents one byte in the block layout.
legend.warning: Warning highlights mark common bug surfaces in packed formats.

groups.title: Simple Formats (32 weights per block)
groups.caption: Single-scale and low-overhead formats used as the baseline family.

groups.title: Grouped / Advanced Formats
groups.caption: Higher-compression layouts add grouping metadata, sub-scales, and more bug surfaces.

footer.title: Compiler Target
footer.body: Spec12 should express grouped tables, legends, and row-state emphasis without falling back to raw SVG rectangles per cell.
